---
title: |
  OPTIMUM: OPTimising IMmunisation Using Mixed schedules
subtitle: |
  Clinical Study Report - Statistical Analyses
description: |
  A double-blind, randomised, controlled trial to compare allergic outcomes in children following vaccination with acellular pertussis antigen given at 2 months of age versus whole cell pertussis in the infant vaccine schedule
date: today
author: James Totterdell
---

```{r}
#| label: packages-setup
library(here)

source(here("reports/R/_setup.R"))
```

```{r}
#| label: data-setup
source(here("reports/R/_data.R"))
```

\clearpage

{{< include _00-summary.qmd >}}

{{< include _01-introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include _02-study-participants.qmd >}}

{{< include _03-outcomes.qmd >}}

{{< include _04-safety.qmd >}}

{{< include _05-reactogenicity.qmd >}}

{{< include _06-immunogenicity.qmd >}}

{{< include _99-appendix.qmd >}}
